item.title: 摩根大通将更多艺电收购融资转向垃圾债券
item.description: 据知情人士透露，摩根大通正将艺电公司创纪录杠杆收购案的债务融资更多转向垃圾债券。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. is shifting more of the debt financing for the record leveraged buyout of Electronic Arts Inc. toward junk bonds, according to people with knowledge of the matter.】

item.title: 千禧银行在奖金发放后人员流动中聘用四名城堡证券交易员
item.description: 千禧管理公司从竞争对手城堡基金挖走了四名股票挑选专家，这家多元策略对冲基金巨头正为争夺人才展开角逐，以应对其资产规模的激增。【原文：Millennium Management hired four stock pickers from rival Citadel as the multistrategy hedge fund giants battle over talent to help manage their soaring assets.】

item.title: 人工智能芯片制造商Cerebras选择摩根士丹利作为首次公开募股（IPO）的承销商。
item.description: 知情人士透露，人工智能芯片制造商Cerebras Systems公司已选定摩根士丹利作为其首次公开募股的主承销商，该公司正重新启动上市计划。【原文：Cerebras Systems Inc. has picked Morgan Stanley to lead its initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, as the artificial intelligence chipmaker mounts a renewed attempt to go public.】

item.title: 华尔街监管机构讨论进驻同一栋大楼
item.description: 据知情人士透露，华尔街两大顶级监管机构正商讨搬迁计划，拟入驻华盛顿同一栋建筑群，该建筑群距美国国会大厦仅数步之遥。【原文：Wall Street’s two top regulators are discussing plans to move into the same building complex in Washington just steps from the US Capitol, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 特朗普签署命令加强打击网络犯罪力度
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周五签署一项行政命令，旨在打击网络犯罪，包括欺诈和勒索行为。该命令要求官员们寻找强有力的工具，打击那些侵害美国家庭、企业和基础设施的跨国犯罪组织。【原文：President Donald Trump signed an executive order Friday aimed at fighting cybercrime, including fraud and extortion, directing officials to identify robust tools to combat transnational criminal organizations preying on American families, businesses and infrastructure.】

item.title: 甲骨文与OpenAI终止旗舰数据中心扩建计划
item.description: 甲骨文公司与OpenAI已取消在得克萨斯州扩建旗舰人工智能数据中心的计划，此前双方在融资问题上谈判陷入僵局，且OpenAI的需求不断变化。【原文：Oracle Corp. and OpenAI have scrapped plans to expand a flagship artificial intelligence data center in Texas after negotiations dragged over financing and OpenAI’s changing needs.】

item.title: 债券交易员涌入通胀对冲工具，因战争推高油价
item.description: 随着中东战争引发能源价格飙升，投资者正蜂拥涌入美国债券市场中的通胀对冲产品，推动部分估值升至近一年高点。【原文：Investors are piling into US bond-market products that protect against inflation — pushing some valuations to the highest levels in nearly a year — as the Mideast war sparks a surge in energy prices.】

item.title: 能源部长赖特呼吁重启印第安点核电站
item.description: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特呼吁重启纽约市北部一座已关闭的核电站，称此举对于满足激增的电力需求至关重要。【原文：US Energy Secretary Chris Wright is calling to restart a shuttered nuclear plant north of New York City, saying it is needed to meet surging demand for power.】

item.title: 五角大楼处罚后，Anthropic面临类似华为的禁令风险
item.description: 人类本位PBC公司面临失去大量美国政府业务的风险，此前美国国防部将其列为供应链风险企业——这是迄今仅针对中国华为技术有限公司等敌对国家企业作出的罕见认定。【原文：Anthropic PBC runs the risk of losing a wide range of US government business after the Defense Department declared it a supply-chain risk, a rare designation that until now has only been assigned to companies from adversary nations like China’s Huawei Technologies Co.】

item.title: 油轮运费飙升迫使美国原油运输商转用小型船舶
item.description: 为将石油从美国墨西哥湾沿岸运往亚洲，货主们采取了不同寻常的举措——预订小型船舶，因为通常使用的巨型油轮成本正急剧攀升。【原文：In a desperate bid to transport oil from the US Gulf Coast to Asia, shippers have taken the unusual step of booking smaller vessels as costs soar for the massive tankers typically used.】

item.title: 巴西反垄断监管机构批准IG4收购巴西化工公司股份
item.description: 巴西反垄断机构已批准一项拟议交易，允许资产管理公司IG4 Capital收购石化生产商巴西化工集团（Braskem SA）的控股权。【原文：Brazil’s antitrust authority has approved a proposed transaction that would allow asset manager IG4 Capital to buy a controlling stake in petrochemicals producer Braskem SA.】

item.title: 太平洋投资管理公司称，私募债务将面临"全面违约周期"
item.description: 太平洋投资管理公司对私募信贷风险的分析显示，在2008年金融危机后创纪录的募资规模推动下，直接贷款工具已放宽承销标准，亟需接受压力测试。【原文：With record fundraising after the 2008 financial crisis, direct-lending vehicles have loosened their underwriting standards and are due for a stress test, according to a Pacific Investment Management Co. analysis of private-credit risks.】

item.title: 韩国头号电力企业加速美国业务扩张，押注人工智能超级周期
item.description: 韩国顶级电力设备制造商现代重工电气公司正加速拓展美国市场，押注人工智能"超级周期"将推动新一轮电力消费浪潮，从而带动变压器和开关设备需求的激增。【原文：South Korea’s top power equipment maker, HD Hyundai Electric Co., is accelerating its US expansion, betting that demand for transformers and switchgear will surge as the artificial intelligence “supercycle” drives a new wave of power consumption.】

item.title: 美联储官员哈马克称利率存在双向风险
item.description: 克利夫兰联邦储备银行行长贝丝·哈马克重申，利率可能在相当长一段时间内维持不变，但同时暗示官员们应做好应对其他结果的准备。【原文：Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland President Beth Hammack reiterated that interest rates could be on hold for quite some time, but signaled officials should be ready to respond to other outcomes.】

item.title: 美联储对就业稳定的判断面临意外下滑的考验
item.description: 一场意外的招聘下滑可能颠覆美联储决策者们的普遍观点——即稳定的劳动力市场将使他们能够在应对持续通胀时保持利率不变。【原文：An unexpected hiring slump threatens to upend the prevailing view among Federal Reserve policymakers that a stabilizing labor market will allow them to keep interest rates steady as they fight persistent inflation.】

item.title: 卫星分析显示卡塔尔主要液化天然气设备完好无损
item.description: 据彭博社对卫星数据的分析显示，卡塔尔大型液化天然气出口设施基本完好无损，表明近期无人机袭击未能击中关键生产设备。【原文：Qatar’s massive LNG export facility remains largely intact, according to a Bloomberg analysis of satellite data, indicating that recent drone strikes missed key production equipment.】

item.title: 美国证券交易委员会希望您停止申请5倍杠杆ETF
item.description: 5倍杠杆ETF在SEC遭遇阻力【原文：5x Leveraged ETFs Meet Resistance at the SEC】

item.title: 格雷尔与勒布朗会晤，美墨加三国筹备谈判
item.description: 美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔与加拿大-美国贸易部长多米尼克·勒布朗周五在华盛顿举行会晤，这是两人数月来首次进行的高级别面对面会谈。【原文：US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer and Canada-US Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc met Friday in Washington in the first high-level, in-person talks in months between the two men.】

item.title: 《最终幻想VII 重制版》导演暗示三部曲终章
item.description: “我希望这不会太遥远，”滨口直树告诉我们。【原文：“I’m hoping it’s not going to be too far in the future,” Naoki Hamaguchi tells us】

item.title: OpenAI发布AI代理安全工具供研究预览
item.description: OpenAI推出一款人工智能代理，旨在协助安全团队发现并修复大型数据库中的漏洞，这可能削弱传统网络安全公司的需求。【原文：OpenAI is introducing an AI agent that’s meant to help security teams find and patch vulnerabilities in large databases, potentially cutting into demand for legacy cyber firms.】

item.title: 交易员警告：若伊朗战争持续升级，油价逼近100美元在即
item.description: 全球能源市场遭遇史上最大冲击已逾一周，油价仍远低于历次危机时的水平。但越来越多的能源高管和交易员警告称，战争每持续一天，世界就离危机临界点更近一步——其中数人预测油价将在数日内突破每桶100美元。【原文：A week into one of the biggest ever disruptions to global energy markets, oil prices still remain far below the levels seen in previous crises. But a growing chorus of energy executives and traders is warning that every day that war rages on is bringing the world closer to crisis point — with several predicting $100 oil within days.】

item.title: Brightline佛罗里达因重组风险进一步陷入困境
item.description: 标准普尔分析师本周将这家陷入困境的私营铁路公司评级进一步下调至垃圾级，指出储备金减少和现金流为负的情况很可能导致Brightline Trains Florida LLC在未来六个月内进行债务重组。【原文：Thinning reserves and negative cash flows will likely lead Brightline Trains Florida LLC to restructure its debt within the next six months, according to S&P analysts who downgraded the struggling private rail line deeper into junk territory this week.】

item.title: 波斯湾仅可见九艘空载油轮
item.description: 能够储存中东主要产油国原油的船舶数量正在急剧减少，目前波斯湾仅有九艘空置的超大型原油运输船。一旦这些船只装满，岸上储油罐将迅速填满，导致更多油田停产。【原文：The tally of ships able to store oil from the big Middle East producers is dwindling fast, with just nine empty very large crude carriers visible in the Persian Gulf. Once those are loaded, onshore storage tanks will fill rapidly, leading to more production shut-ins.】

item.title: 联想在MWC引领潮流，通过友好机器人实现人工智能人性化
item.description: 联想集团及其他消费电子公司本周借巴塞罗那世界移动通信大会之机，试探市场对具备类人特征的实体人工智能产品的接受度。【原文：Lenovo Group Ltd. and other consumer electronics companies used the MWC Barcelona conference this week to test appetites for physical AI products with humanlike characteristics.】

item.title: 华尔街交易台重写美伊战争股市应对策略
item.description: 美国银行宏观销售部门正引导客户买入HALO类股票，即"硬资产、低折旧"股票。高盛则推荐一篮子地缘政治概念股，涵盖国防承包商、石油生产商和油轮公司。巴克莱的交易员们则敦促投资者重新配置资金，回归过去几年的大赢家——美国超级巨头股。【原文：The macro sales desk at Bank of America is steering clients to buy HALO, or “hard assets, low obsolescence” stocks. At Goldman Sachs they’re recommending a geopolitical basket of defense contractors, oil producers and tanker companies. Over at Barclays, traders are urging a rotation back into the big winners of years past, US megacaps.】

item.title: 奥尔班扣留的8200万美元是常规资金运输
item.description: 据知情人士透露，一辆被匈牙利官员扣押的乌克兰卡车载有价值约8200万美元的黄金、欧元和美元纸币，该运输属于常规业务，旨在满足这个饱受战争蹂躏的国家中企业和公民的现金需求。【原文：A Ukrainian truck detained by Hungarian officers carrying about $82 million of gold, euro and dollar bank notes was part of a regular transport to meet cash needs of companies and citizens in the war-torn country, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 美敦力糖尿病业务部门MiniMed在5.6亿美元IPO后股价下跌2%
item.description: 糖尿病管理公司MiniMed集团的股票在首次公开募股中筹集5.6亿美元后，于上市首日下跌2%。该公司即将从医疗巨头美敦力公司剥离独立运营。【原文：Shares of MiniMed Group Inc., a diabetes management firm that will be separated from health-care giant Medtronic Plc, dipped 2% in its trading debut, after the firm raised $560 million in an initial public offering.】

item.title: 巴西化工巨头Idesa与债权人商讨潜在破产重组贷款事宜
item.description: 据知情人士透露，墨西哥企业Braskem Idesa SAPI正与债权人商谈融资事宜，该资金将用于支持公司在美国启动《破产法》第11章程序期间的运营。【原文：Mexico’s Braskem Idesa SAPI is in talks with creditors for finance that would fund the company through a potential Chapter 11 bankruptcy proceeding in the US, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 银行、资产管理公司股价暴跌，信贷担忧持续发酵
item.description: 金融类股再度下跌，因对私人信贷的新担忧叠加市场全面抛售，重创本已疲软的金融板块。【原文：Shares of financial firms are once again sliding, as fresh worries over private credit combine with a broad market selloff to hit the weakened sector.】

item.title: 美国原油价格首次突破每桶90美元，创2023年10月以来新高
item.description: 美国原油期货价格自2023年10月以来首次突破每桶90美元大关，伊朗战争导致关键能源市场供应链中断，霍尔木兹海峡的航运几乎完全停滞。【原文：US oil futures surged above $90 a barrel for the first time since October 2023 as the war in Iran upends critical energy market flows, with shipping through the Strait of Hormuz at a near-total halt.】
